login.title: Sign In
login.subtitle: Natural Language Programming Problems for the Age of GenAI

email.label: Email Address
email.hint: Use your work or personal email

password.label: Password
password.tooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.

login.redirectHint: Having trouble? Redirect mode works better with slow connections or strict network policies.

errors.emailInUse: This email is already in use. Please try another one.
errors.weakPassword: The password is too weak. Please use a stronger password.
errors.internalError: An internal error occurred. Please try again later.
errors.tooManyRequests: Too many requests to login. Please try again later.
errors.missingFields: Please enter an email and password.
errors.cookiesBlocked: Your browser is blocking authentication cookies. Please use "Redirect Mode" below or adjust your privacy settings.
errors.popupTimeout: Connection is slow. Please try "Use Redirect Mode" below.
errors.popupBlocked: Popup was blocked. Please allow popups or use "Redirect Mode" below.
errors.networkError: Network connection issue detected. Please try "Use Redirect Mode" below.
errors.unknown: An unknown error occurred. Please try again later.
errors.noGoogleAuthDebug: Google authentication is not available in debug mode.
errors.registrationFailed: Registration failed. Unable to register the new user.
errors.googleLoginFailed: Google login failed. Please try again or use redirect mode.
errors.redirectFailed: Unable to start redirect login. Please check your connection.

account.title: Account Settings
account.languageDescription: Select your preferred language for the interface and AI feedback

consent.title: Data Processing Consent
consent.description: Please review and accept the following to continue. Items marked with * are required.
consent.privacyPolicy: I have read and agree to the
consent.optionalHeader: Optional data processing (you can change these later in Settings)
consent.aiProcessing: Allow AI analysis of my code submissions
consent.aiProcessingDetail: Your code may be sent to OpenAI for comprehension analysis and feedback generation.
consent.researchUse: Allow anonymized use of my data for research
consent.researchUseDetail: De-identified submission and progress data may be used for educational research.
consent.behavioralTrackingDetail: Track detailed metrics like time spent, hint usage, and completion patterns.
consent.consentRequired: You must accept the Privacy Policy and Terms of Service to continue.

ageGate.title: Age Verification
ageGate.description: We need to verify your age to comply with data protection regulations. This information is used to determine applicable privacy protections.
ageGate.childMessage: Users under 13 require parental or guardian consent (COPPA). A parent or guardian must approve your account.
ageGate.minorMessage: Users under 18 have additional privacy protections. Some features may require parental consent.
ageGate.errorRequired: Please enter your date of birth.

coppa.title: Parental Consent Required
coppa.message: Users under 13 require verifiable parental or guardian consent before creating an account (COPPA). Please ask a parent or guardian to create an account on your behalf.

privacy.title: Privacy & Data Settings
privacy.consentDescription: Manage your data processing preferences. Required consents cannot be withdrawn without deleting your account.
privacy.directoryDescription: Control whether your name and email are visible to instructors in course rosters.
privacy.directoryToggle: Show my name and email in course rosters

deletion.title: Delete Account
deletion.description: Requesting account deletion will deactivate your account immediately. After a 30-day grace period, all your data will be permanently deleted. During the grace period, you can cancel the deletion by logging in.
deletion.retentionNote: Note: Anonymized submission data may be retained for research purposes (scores, code, timestamps) but will no longer be linked to your identity.
deletion.confirmCheckbox: I understand this action cannot be undone after the grace period.
deletion.scheduledMessage: Your account will be permanently deleted on
deletion.scheduledCancel: You can cancel this request before then.
deletion.successCancelled: Deletion cancelled. Your account is active again.
deletion.errorRequest: Failed to request deletion. Please try again later.
deletion.errorCancel: Failed to cancel deletion. Please try again.

dataExport.title: Export Your Data
dataExport.description: Download a copy of all your personal data in JSON format. This includes your profile, submissions, progress, and consent history.
dataExport.error: Failed to export data. Please try again later.

cookie.message: We use essential cookies for site functionality. Optional cookies help us improve the experience.
